## LibraryData.Converters.collection() function

Returns a converter that validates a [collection](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.icollection.md) using the supplied converters.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function collection<TCOLLECTIONID extends string, TITEMID extends string, TITEM>(params: ICollectionConverterParams<TCOLLECTIONID, TITEMID, TITEM>): Converter<ICollection<TITEM, TCOLLECTIONID, TITEMID>>;
```
